User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /api/

# Prevent crawling of build artifacts / config
Disallow: /.wrangler/
Disallow: /.env

# AI search crawlers — explicit allow for GEO/AI search visibility
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: GoogleOther
Allow: /

# Sitemaps
Sitemap: https://www.webcoreuae.com/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for polite bots
Crawl-delay: 1
